name: Barbell Squat
cues: Brace core, sit back and down, drive knees out.

name: Goblet Squat
cues: Hold dumbbell at chest, elbows inside knees, sit deep.

name: Leg Press
cues: Feet hip-width, press through heels, don't lock knees at top.

name: Hack Squat
cues: Shoulder pads firm, feet mid-platform, full depth.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
cues: Rear foot elevated, front shin vertical, knee tracks over toes.

name: Reverse Lunge
cues: Step back, lower knee to floor, drive front heel to stand.

name: Walking Lunge
cues: Long stride, torso upright, knee just above floor, alternate legs.

name: Box Squat
cues: Sit back fully to box, pause, drive up through heels.

name: Step-up
cues: Full foot on box, drive through heel, avoid pushing off back foot.

name: Sumo Squat
cues: Wide stance, toes flared, keep chest up, drive knees out.

name: Front Squat
cues: Elbows high, upright torso, knees track over toes, full depth.

name: Pause Squat
cues: Brace core, pause 2-3s at bottom, drive up explosively.

name: Safety Bar Squat
cues: Arms hold cambered handles, more upright than barbell squat, full depth.

name: Smith Machine Squat
cues: Feet slightly forward, use the fixed bar path to sit back.

name: Pistol Squat
cues: Extend one leg forward, sit onto the working leg, drive through heel.

name: Jump Squat
cues: Quarter squat, explode up, land softly, reset before next rep.

name: Lateral Lunge
cues: Step wide to side, sit into the stepping leg, keep other leg straight.

name: Pendulum Squat
cues: Lean back against pad, feet forward on platform, full depth squat.

name: Sissy Squat
cues: Hold for balance, lean back as knees drive forward past toes.

name: Split Squat
cues: Staggered stance, lower rear knee toward floor, drive front heel to stand.

name: Heels-elevated Squat
cues: Plates under heels for more upright torso, emphasises quad sweep.

name: Zercher Squat
cues: Bar in crook of elbows, elbows inside knees, upright torso, full depth.

name: Anderson Squat
cues: Bar set in pins at parallel, no stretch reflex, full effort concentric only.

name: Belt Squat
cues: Load attached to belt, stand on elevated platform, squat freely without bar on back.

name: Deadlift
cues: Hips hinge back, bar stays close to legs, neutral spine.

name: Sumo Deadlift
cues: Wide stance, toes flared, bar close, chest up, drive floor away.

name: Trap Bar Deadlift
cues: Stand inside bar, neutral spine, push floor away, stand tall.

name: Romanian Deadlift
cues: Soft knee, hinge until hamstring stretch, drive hips forward.

name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
cues: Same as RDL but with dumbbells, keep them close to legs.

name: Single-leg Romanian Deadlift
cues: Hinge on one leg, weight on same-side arm, keep hips square.

name: Good Morning
cues: Bar on traps, hinge forward with soft knees, squeeze glutes.

name: Hip Thrust
cues: Bench at shoulder blades, drive hips up, squeeze at top.

name: Glute Bridge
cues: Feet flat, drive hips up, squeeze glutes at top, hold 1s.

name: Hyperextension
cues: Hips on pad, hinge down under control, extend to neutral.

name: Deficit Deadlift
cues: Stand on 2-4 inch deficit, start with hips lower, emphasises off-floor strength.

name: Snatch-grip Deadlift
cues: Wide grip forces lower hips, keeps bar close, builds upper back and grip.

name: Stiff-leg Deadlift
cues: Minimal knee bend, hinge until bar below knees, squeeze glutes to stand.

name: Cable Pull-through
cues: Face away from cable, hinge back between legs, drive hips forward at top.

name: Dumbbell Hip Thrust
cues: Upper back on bench, dumbbell on hips, drive up, squeeze glutes at top.

name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
cues: Feet anchored, lower torso toward floor under control, push up to return.

name: Reverse Hyperextension
cues: Hips on pad, swing legs up to parallel, squeeze glutes, lower slowly.

name: Glute Ham Raise
cues: Secure feet, lower until nearly horizontal, curl body back up using hamstrings.

name: Power Clean
cues: Aggressive hip drive, high pull, drop under bar, catch in partial squat.

name: Hang Power Clean
cues: Start from hang at knees, explosive hip extension, pull under.

name: Power Snatch
cues: Wide grip, explosive pull, bar travels close to body, catch overhead in partial squat.

name: Clean Pull
cues: Pull with clean mechanics but don't receive bar, emphasise triple extension.

name: Hang Snatch
cues: Wide grip from hang, explosive hip drive, pull wide, receive overhead in squat.

name: Dumbbell Swing
cues: Hinge and swing between legs, snap hips to propel dumbbell to chest height.

name: Kettlebell Deadlift
cues: Kettlebell between feet, neutral spine, press floor away, stand tall at top.

name: Snatch
cues: Wide grip, explosive pull, pull under into deep squat, receive with arms locked.

name: Bench Press
cues: Arch, retract scapulae, bar touches low chest, elbows ~45°.

name: Close-grip Bench Press
cues: Hands shoulder-width, elbows tucked, press straight up.

name: Incline Bench Press
cues: 30-45° incline, touch high chest, control descent.

name: Decline Bench Press
cues: Feet anchored, slight decline, touch low chest, control.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
cues: Neutral or pronated grip, full ROM, avoid flaring elbows too wide.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
cues: 30-45° incline, dumbbells at chest, press up and slightly in.

name: Dumbbell Chest Fly
cues: Slight elbow bend, wide arc down, squeeze chest at top.

name: Cable Chest Fly
cues: High pulleys, slight forward lean, arc hands together at chest height.

name: Machine Chest Press
cues: Seat height aligns handles with mid-chest, full press and controlled return.

name: Push-up
cues: Plank position, elbows ~45°, chest to floor, lock out top.

name: Overhead Press
cues: Bar in front, tight core, press straight up, lock out.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
cues: Arms 90° at start, press to full lock-out.

name: Arnold Press
cues: Start palms in, rotate to press up, reverse on way down.

name: Machine Shoulder Press
cues: Seat height keeps elbows below handles, press overhead, control descent.

name: Landmine Press
cues: Staggered stance, press bar along its natural arc, full extension.

name: Dip
cues: Lean forward for chest focus, stay upright for tri focus.

name: Floor Press
cues: Lie on floor, elbows touch down each rep, eliminates leg drive, pure upper body.

name: Z-Press
cues: Seated on floor, legs straight, press overhead, demands core and hip flexibility.

name: Pike Push-up
cues: Inverted V position, lower head toward floor, press back up, elbows track out.

name: Handstand Push-up
cues: Wall-supported, lower crown toward floor, press to lockout, body vertical.

name: Decline Dumbbell Press
cues: Feet elevated or declined bench, press dumbbells up and slightly in, full ROM.

name: Diamond Push-up
cues: Hands form diamond under sternum, elbows track rearward, full push-up ROM.

name: Push Press
cues: Slight knee dip, drive legs, press bar overhead, lock out at top.

name: Push Jerk
cues: Dip, drive, re-dip under bar, receive with arms locked, stand up.

name: Incline Cable Press
cues: Low pulleys, incline bench, constant tension throughout ROM.

name: Weighted Push-up
cues: Plate on back, full push-up, maintain rigid plank position throughout.

name: Ring Dip
cues: Support on rings, lower with control, turn rings out at top for stability.

name: Svend Press
cues: Squeeze plates together throughout, press forward from chest to arm extension.

name: Spoto Press
cues: Pause bar 1-2 inches above chest, no touch, builds off-chest strength.

name: Clean and Jerk
cues: Clean the bar to rack position, jerk overhead in one fluid sequence.

name: Jerk
cues: From rack, dip and drive explosively, split or power under, arms locked.

name: Machine Strict Press
cues: Strict pressing machine, no momentum, full ROM, slow eccentric.

name: Barbell Row
cues: Hip hinge 45°, pull to lower abdomen, retract shoulder blades.

name: Pendlay Row
cues: Bar returns to floor each rep, explosive pull, horizontal torso.

name: T-bar Row
cues: Chest on pad, pull handles to chest, squeeze at top, slow descent.

name: Dumbbell Row
cues: Brace on bench, pull to hip, full stretch at bottom.

name: Chest-supported Row
cues: Chest on incline bench, arms hang free, row to hips.

name: Cable Row
cues: Sit tall, pull to navel, avoid lumbar rounding.

name: Pull-up
cues: Hang dead, depress scapulae, chin over bar, full hang.

name: Chin-up
cues: Supinated grip, chin over bar, full dead hang between reps.

name: Inverted Row
cues: Body rigid, pull chest to bar, control the descent.

name: Lat Pulldown
cues: Slight lean back, drive elbows down, squeeze lats at bottom.

name: Single-arm Cable Pulldown
cues: Slight lean, pull handle to hip, feel full lat stretch at top.

name: Face Pull
cues: Rope to face level, external rotate at end, elbows high.

name: Machine Row
cues: Chest against pad, pull handles to lower chest, squeeze shoulder blades.

name: Meadows Row
cues: Stagger stance, grip barbell at end, row with rotation to hip, full lat stretch.

name: Cable High Row
cues: High pulley, lean slightly back, pull elbows down and back, squeeze at peak.

name: Straight-arm Pulldown
cues: Arms nearly straight, pull bar to thighs with lat contraction, constant tension.

name: Incline Dumbbell Row
cues: Prone on incline bench, row dumbbells to hips, chest supported removes momentum.

name: Neutral-grip Pull-up
cues: Palms facing each other, chin over bar, full dead hang between reps.

name: Seated Machine Row
cues: Chest against pad, neutral grip, full retraction at peak, slow eccentric.

name: Renegade Row
cues: Push-up position on dumbbells, maintain plank, row one arm, minimal rotation.

name: Band Pull-apart
cues: Arms straight, pull band apart to chest level, retract scapulae, control return.

name: Machine Pullover
cues: Elbows on pad, pull bar down in arc from overhead to hips, full lat stretch.

name: Seal Row
cues: Prone on elevated bench, pull bar to chest, scapulae fully retracted at top.

name: Overhand Cable Row
cues: Pronated grip, pull to sternum, retract scapulae, avoid shrugging.

name: Chest-supported Cable Row
cues: Chest on incline pad, cable row, eliminates momentum, pure back contraction.

name: Half-kneeling Cable Row
cues: Kneeling with one knee down, single-arm row, resist rotation, stay tall.

name: Farmer's Carry
cues: Shoulders packed, walk with short controlled steps, stay tall.

name: Suitcase Carry
cues: Single dumbbell, resist lateral tilt, stay tall, brace obliques.

name: Yoke Carry
cues: Loaded yoke on shoulders, stay upright, short quick steps, brace hard.

name: Overhead Carry
cues: Lock out overhead, packed shoulder, walk with control, don't lean.

name: Cross-body Carry
cues: Single dumbbell at side, resist lateral tilt, walk tall, brace obliques.

name: Trap Bar Carry
cues: Inside trap bar, grip handles, stand tall, walk with controlled short strides.

name: Goblet Carry
cues: Hold weight at chest, tall posture, brace core, walk with intention.

name: Bicep Curl
cues: Elbows fixed at sides, supinate at top, full extension.

name: Dumbbell Curl
cues: Alternate or together, supinate as you curl.

name: Hammer Curl
cues: Neutral grip throughout, elbows fixed, full ROM.

name: Preacher Curl
cues: Arms on pad, no swinging, squeeze at top, slow negative.

name: Cable Curl
cues: Constant tension, elbows fixed, supinate at top, slow return.

name: Concentration Curl
cues: Elbow braced against inner thigh, curl to shoulder, full supination at top.

name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
cues: Incline bench, arms hang behind torso for pre-stretch, curl fully, supinate.

name: Spider Curl
cues: Prone on incline bench, arms hang freely, curl bar up, peak contraction.

name: Machine Curl
cues: Elbows on pad, full curl, squeeze at top, slow negative on the way down.

name: Zottman Curl
cues: Curl up supinated, rotate to pronated at top, lower with reverse curl, rotate back.

name: Tricep Pushdown
cues: Elbows fixed, press to full extension, controlled return.

name: Overhead Tricep Extension
cues: Elbows close to head, lower dumbbell behind, extend to lockout.

name: Skull Crusher
cues: Bar to forehead or behind, elbows vertical, full lockout.

name: Cable Overhead Tricep Extension
cues: Rope attachment, face away from cable, extend arms overhead from behind head.

name: Machine Tricep Extension
cues: Elbows on pad, press handles down to full extension, slow controlled return.

name: Close-grip Push-up
cues: Hands close, elbows tracking rearward, lower chest to floor, full extension.

name: Tricep Dip
cues: Hands behind on bench, stay upright to target triceps, lower until 90°, press up.

name: Rope Pushdown
cues: Rope attachment, spread rope at bottom, full extension, elbows fixed at sides.

name: Reverse-grip Pushdown
cues: Underhand grip on bar, elbows fixed, full extension, hits long head more.

name: JM Press
cues: Close grip, lower bar toward throat with elbows out, partial extension at top.

name: Lateral Raise
cues: Slight forward lean, raise to shoulder height, lead with elbow.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
cues: Low pulley, cable across body, raise to shoulder height, control.

name: Rear Delt Fly
cues: Hinge forward, slight elbow bend, arc up to shoulder level.

name: Upright Row
cues: Narrow grip, lead with elbows, pull to chin, slow descent.

name: Machine Lateral Raise
cues: Elbows on pad, abduct arms to shoulder height, slow eccentric.

name: Cable Rear Delt Fly
cues: Cross cables, straight arms, pull to sides at shoulder height, squeeze rear delts.

name: Dumbbell Front Raise
cues: Slight elbow bend, raise to eye level alternating or together, control descent.

name: Cable Front Raise
cues: Low cable, raise arm to shoulder height, constant tension, control descent.

name: Plate Front Raise
cues: Hold plate with both hands, raise straight to eye level, control the descent.

name: Barbell Shrug
cues: Arms straight, shrug straight up, hold 1s at top, no rolling.

name: Dumbbell Shrug
cues: Arms at sides, straight shrug, brief pause at top.

name: Cable Shrug
cues: Straight shrug up, pause briefly at top, constant tension from cable.

name: Power Shrug
cues: Use momentum for heavy shrug, explosive elevation, brief pause at top.

name: Behind-the-back Shrug
cues: Bar behind thighs, shrug straight up, targets mid and lower traps more.

name: Calf Raise
cues: Full ROM, pause at top, controlled descent.

name: Seated Calf Raise
cues: Knees bent stresses soleus, full heel drop, press to full extension.

name: Leg Press Calf Raise
cues: Toes on edge of platform, full ROM, slow stretch at bottom, press to full extension.

name: Standing Single-leg Calf Raise
cues: One foot on step edge, full ROM, pause at bottom stretch, no momentum.

name: Donkey Calf Raise
cues: Bent over position, pads on lower back, full ROM, slow stretch at bottom.

name: Leg Curl
cues: Full curl, hold briefly at top, slow eccentric.

name: Lying Leg Curl
cues: Hips on pad, curl toward glutes, pause at top, slow return.

name: Seated Leg Curl
cues: Pad above knees, curl down under seat, full contraction, slow eccentric.

name: Standing Leg Curl
cues: Single leg, stabilise on one leg, curl heel toward glute, slow negative.

name: Leg Extension
cues: Full extension, hold at top, slow return.

name: Terminal Knee Extension
cues: Band or cable at knee, fully extend knee from slight bend, squeeze quad at top.

name: Adductor Machine
cues: Sit tall, squeeze knees together, control the opening phase.

name: Abductor Machine
cues: Sit tall, push knees apart against pad, control the closing phase.

name: Cable Kickback
cues: Facing cable, ankle strap, kick leg back and up, squeeze glute at top.

name: Clamshell
cues: Side-lying, knees bent, rotate top knee up like a clamshell, keep hips stacked.

name: Hip Thrust Machine
cues: Machine-loaded hip thrust, full extension, squeeze glutes at top, controlled return.

name: Plank
cues: Neutral spine, squeeze core and glutes, breathe.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
cues: Dead hang, raise legs to 90° or higher, control descent.

name: Cable Crunch
cues: Kneel, rope at sides of head, crunch elbows to knees, round spine.

name: Dead Bug
cues: Lower back pressed to floor, extend opposite arm and leg, breathe out.

name: Ab Rollout
cues: On knees, roll out on inhale, pull back with lats and core.

name: Russian Twist
cues: Lean back slightly, feet off floor, rotate side to side, hold weight for load.

name: Bicycle Crunch
cues: Alternate elbow to opposite knee, extend leg straight, maintain lumbar contact.

name: Wood Chop
cues: Rotate from high to low or low to high, pivot feet, use whole body rotation.

name: Side Plank
cues: Stack feet, straight body line, push hip up, don't let waist sag.

name: Dragon Flag
cues: Grip behind head, raise body to vertical, lower under control, stay rigid.

name: Hollow Body Hold
cues: Flatten lower back, arms overhead, legs extended, hold the hollow position.

name: Pallof Press
cues: Cable at chest height, perpendicular to body, press and hold, resist rotation.

name: Reverse Crunch
cues: Lying on back, curl hips off floor, knees toward chest, lower under control.

name: L-sit
cues: On parallel bars or floor, arms locked, legs straight and parallel to ground.

name: Toes-to-bar
cues: Dead hang, kip or strict, touch toes to bar, lower under control.

name: V-Up
cues: Simultaneously raise legs and torso, touch hands to feet at top, controlled descent.

name: GHD Sit-up
cues: Feet secured on GHD, lower until parallel, sit up explosively or controlled.

name: Machine Back Extension
cues: Hips on pad, cross arms on chest, hinge down under control, extend to neutral.

name: Wrist Curl
cues: Forearms on thighs, curl wrists up, full ROM, slow eccentric.

name: Wrist Extension
cues: Forearm on thigh, extend wrist upward against gravity, slow and controlled.

name: Plate Pinch
cues: Pinch two plates together, hold for time, builds grip and pinch strength.

name: Reverse Curl
cues: Pronated grip, curl full ROM, elbows fixed, targets brachioradialis heavily.

name: Pec Deck
cues: Seat aligns elbows at shoulder height, squeeze chest to close, control opening.

name: Cable Crossover
cues: High pulleys, cable across body, cross hands at bottom for peak contraction.

name: Low-to-High Cable Fly
cues: Low cable, arc hands upward from hips to above shoulder height, squeeze top.

name: High-to-Low Cable Fly
cues: High cable, arc hands down from shoulder height to hip level, squeeze bottom.

name: Dumbbell Pull-over
cues: Across bench, dumbbell behind head, arc back over chest, keep slight elbow bend.

name: Kettlebell Swing
cues: Hip hinge drives the swing, arms are a pendulum, snap hips at top.

name: Box Jump
cues: Athletic stance, swing arms, jump fully, land softly, step down.

name: Battle Ropes
cues: Anchor rope, alternate or simultaneous waves, hips slightly bent, full intensity.

name: Rowing Machine
cues: Drive with legs, then lean back, then pull handle to lower chest, reverse sequence.

name: Ski Erg
cues: Pull handles down and back in a ski-poling motion, hinge at hips, drive with lats.

name: Assault Bike
cues: Push and pull handles, maintain cadence, full arm and leg engagement.

name: Sled Push
cues: Lean forward, drive through balls of feet, keep low, fast short steps.

name: Jump Rope
cues: Land on balls of feet, minimal jump height, wrists rotate the rope, rhythm.

name: Burpee
cues: Squat down, kick feet out, push-up, jump feet forward, explode up.

name: Mountain Climber
cues: Plank position, drive knees to chest alternating, keep hips level.

name: Thruster
cues: Front squat to overhead press in one fluid movement, use leg drive for press.

name: Wall Ball
cues: Squat deep, drive up, throw ball to target, catch and immediately re-squat.
